content: We help organisations unlock the power of artificial intelligence. From machine learning models to generative AI solutions we enable businesses to transform their operations. Our team works with cloud AI services and custom AI implementations to deliver measurable results. We specialise in AI governance and AI security ensuring your deployments meet compliance requirements. Whether you need MLOps pipelines or responsible AI frameworks we have the expertise to guide your journey.

We are a leading partner for enterprise ERP implementations. We deliver end-to-end solutions across finance supply chain management and business operations. Our ERP consultants help organisations with digital transformation change management and cloud migration. We integrate automation platforms alongside ERP to extend functionality and drive automation. Data migration system integration and user adoption are core to every project we deliver.

We deliver customer relationship management solutions including sales customer service and marketing automation. We help organisations build a 360-degree view of their customers. Our CRM practice covers customer portals customer data platforms and integration with data lakes for advanced analytics. We also support field service implementations for organisations with mobile workforces.

We provide cloud infrastructure services including cloud migration landing zones and hybrid cloud architecture. We help organisations move from on-premises to cloud with minimal disruption. Our cloud team specialises in container orchestration DevOps infrastructure as code and cloud security. We also deliver FinOps consulting to optimise cloud spend and ensure cost governance across your cloud estate.

We help organisations become data-driven with modern analytics platforms and business intelligence tools. We build modern data platforms data warehouses and real-time analytics solutions. Our data practice covers data governance master data management and data quality frameworks. We work with data cataloguing and lineage tracking tools. Whether you need a lakehouse architecture or embedded analytics our consultants deliver solutions that turn data into actionable insights.

We provide ongoing managed services for ERP systems cloud infrastructure and automation platforms. Our support covers application management performance monitoring and continuous improvement. We offer tiered support packages with SLA-backed response times. Our managed services team handles security patching platform upgrades license management and proactive health checks. We also provide change management support and end-user training as part of our service agreements.

We deliver industry-specific solutions for discrete and process manufacturing. We implement supply chain management systems with manufacturing execution production planning and shop floor integration. Our manufacturing expertise covers IoT integration predictive maintenance digital twins and smart factory initiatives. We help manufacturers optimise their supply chain with demand forecasting warehouse management and vendor collaboration portals.

We support retail organisations with unified commerce solutions. We deliver omnichannel experiences point of sale implementations and e-commerce platform integrations. Our retail practice includes customer loyalty programmes inventory optimisation and retail analytics. We also help retailers with fraud protection and personalisation engines to improve conversion and reduce losses.
